The [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation's]] '''YZ-900''' was an unusually heavily-armed cargo vessel.<ref name="G2" />

The design was part of the [[YV series]], which CEC introduced during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Although the designers officially insisted that they were just well-armed freighters, and the Empire accepted this, it was widely assumed that they were really intended as paramilitary vessels.<ref name="G2" />

Measuring 54.5 meters in length, the YZ-900 was armed with a pair of heavy twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets in the centre of the hull, two double laser cannons on the wings, and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers firing forward and aft. The YZ-900 required a crew of several people to operate, including gunners, and could carry up to fourteen passengers and 500 metric tons of cargo.<ref name="G2" />

One YZ-900, the ''[[White Wing]]'', was believed to have been used as an assault ship by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] commandos making raids in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The YZ-900 was introduced in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]. The detailed statistics given there are for a specific modified ship, the ''White Wing'', but the source describes in detail how this ship varies from the basic design, allowing the statistics of a standard YZ-990 to be extrapolated. However, the source does not enumerate the exact number of concussion missiles, or the exact size of the standard crew of a stock YZ-900 (though it is evidently larger than the ''White Wing''<nowiki>'</nowiki>s minimal complenent of one pilot and two optional gunners).<ref name="G2" />
